critical.mandate: Action items are pre-sprint work — resolve BEFORE sprint planning, not during sprints
Route each item to the correct agent based on type: clarification→assignee agent, implementation→SM, process→user, automation→SM
Every resolution must include reasoning — no silent closures
Items open for 3+ sprints auto-escalate from MEDIUM → HIGH

step.title: Load and Display
step.action: If file doesn't exist: display "No action items tracked yet. Action items are created by /kratos-retro, /kratos-triage-findings, /kratos-tech-debt-review, and /kratos-correct-course." and STOP.
Filter to open and in-progress items only (skip done/invalid/deferred)
Apply escalation: items open for 3+ sprints → auto-escalate MEDIUM → HIGH. Items open for 5+ sprints → flag for mandatory user review.
If a specific action_id was provided (e.g., /kratos action A-001): filter to that single item

Display all open items grouped by priority (HIGH first):
=== Action Items: {open_count} open ===
| # | ID | Title | Type | Priority | Age | Assignee | {for each open item}
Processing {count} items...

step.title: Process Each Item
step.action:
For each open item (highest priority first, then oldest first):
Display: "=== {item.id}: {item.title} ===" Show: type, priority, source, escalation_count, related_stories, original context from source_ref
Route based on type:
**clarification:** If assignee is an agent: Spawn the assignee agent as a subagent with this prompt: "You are {assignee}. An action item needs your decision: Title: {title} Context: {original context from source_ref} Related stories: {related_stories} This has been open for {escalation_count} sprints. Make a decision: [resolve] with reasoning, [create-story] if implementation needed, or [defer] with justification." Wait for agent to return with decision. If no assignee: ask user who should decide.
**implementation:** Spawn SM as a subagent: "You are the Scrum Master. An action item needs implementation: Title: {title} Context: {original context} Related stories: {related_stories} Decide: [create-story] create a new story for this work, [add-to-existing] add to an existing backlog story, or [already-done] if this was addressed by completed stories." Wait for SM to return with decision. If create-story: spawn /kratos-create-story subagent with the context. If add-to-existing: update the target story's tasks.
**process:** Present to user directly: "This action item recommends a process change: {title} Context: {original context} Options: [approve] implement the change, [dismiss] not needed, [defer] address later" Wait for user decision.
**automation:** Route to SM to create an implementation story (same as implementation type).
In YOLO mode: auto-apply agent/SM recommendations without user confirmation.

step.title: Update Tracker
step.action: For each processed item, update action-items.yaml: - status: done | invalid | deferred | in-progress (based on decision) - resolution: reasoning from the deciding agent/user - resolved_date: current date (for done/invalid) - related_stories: add any newly created story keys - Update last_updated timestamp

step.title: Summary Report
